cI = RAY + (ratePerSecond * timeDelta) + (secondTerm * (timeDelta -1)/ timeDelta)
In a real world scenerio you dont just pay debt on the original debt, you pay
interest on the already built interest too. this is called compounding

In simpler terms this function is a growth calculator, it figures out how
much debt (or a deposit) has increased because of interest since the last time
the contract checked the clock
